case_title: YUK WAH SHUNG VS. DONG YI ZHANG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT RE HER NEW ADDRESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, DONG YI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ZHANG, DONG YI RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SHUNG, YUK WAH $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,075.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR THE IMPROPER LOCK-OUT, AND REMOVAL OF THE STOVE FROM THE UNIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR RESPONSE RECEIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHUNG, YUK WAH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALEX ANOLIK FILED BY ZHANG, DONG YI
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHUNG, YUK WAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, DONG YI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHUNG, YUK WAH
